name: Assassination of Qasem Soleimani
description: [Qasem Soleimani](/people/qasem-soleimani), commander of the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force), was killed in a US drone strike on his convoy outside Baghdad International Airport on 3 January 2020, authorised by President Trump. Also killed was [Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis](/people/abu-mahdi-al-muhandis), deputy commander of Iraq's [Popular Mobilization Forces](/orgs/popular-mobilization-forces). Iran vowed retaliation and launched ballistic missile strikes on US bases in Iraq days later. [Esmail Qaani](/people/esmail-qaani) was appointed Quds Force commander the same day.
editorial_notes: Triggered Iranian ballistic missile strikes on Ain al-Assad base in Iraq on 8 January 2020.
